# Best Biohacking & Longevity Marketing Agencies

- [Follow](https://topgrowthmarketing.com/best-biohacking-marketing-agencies/# "Follow on Facebook")
- [Follow](https://topgrowthmarketing.com/best-biohacking-marketing-agencies/# "Follow on Twitter")
- [Follow](https://topgrowthmarketing.com/best-biohacking-marketing-agencies/# "Follow on Linkedin")
- [Follow](https://topgrowthmarketing.com/best-biohacking-marketing-agencies/# "Follow on Instagram")

TL;DR

Biohacking and longevity brands require marketing agencies with specific expertise in compliant health claims, educated consumer audiences, and the scientific content strategy that builds trust in this category. The agencies that succeed in this space understand the FTC's health claim guidelines, can produce credible scientific content without making drug claims, and know how to convert a research-savvy audience that doesn't respond to typical DTC tactics.

Related Services: [eCommerce Marketing](https://topgrowthmarketing.com/services/ecommerce-marketing-agency/)

Your biohacking product might be revolutionary and your longevity supplement might be backed by science.

But none of that matters if the people who need your products can’t find you in a crowded and complex digital landscape.

The market is flooded with quick-fix solutions and unproven claims. Consumers are more skeptical than ever, and navigating the complex landscape of advertising regulations for health and wellness products is a daunting task.

.

So how do you get your innovative product in front of the right audience?

With a specialized biohacking and longevity marketing agency, of course.

### What should biohacking and longevity brands look for in a marketing agency?

Look for FTC health-claim compliance experience, scientific content production capability, and a track record converting research-driven audiences. Generic DTC tactics — aggressive discount codes, vague benefit copy — actively damage longevity brand trust with the educated consumers who buy these products.

### How is biohacking marketing different from regular ecommerce marketing?

Biohacking buyers research deeply before purchase — they read studies, compare ingredient panels, and follow specific practitioners on YouTube and X. Winning means investing 60–70% of content budget into long-form education, not just creative ads, and threading scientific credibility through every channel.

### What's the typical CAC for biohacking and longevity DTC brands?

CAC for premium longevity brands runs $80–$250+, well above generic supplements ($30–$80), because the audience is smaller and conversion requires multiple educational touchpoints. Brands with LTV:CAC ratios under 3:1 typically need to either niche down or rebuild lifecycle marketing.

## **Why Do You Need a Marketing Agency for Your Biohacking or Longevity Brand?**

One word: Trust.

The biohacking and longevity market is built on a foundation of scientific credibility and authentic results.

**Consumers in this space are highly educated and discerning**; they can spot pseudoscience from a mile away.

Generic marketing tactics won’t just fall flat; they can actively damage your brand’s reputation.

A specialized agency understands the nuances of this industry:

- They know how to translate complex scientific concepts into compelling, compliant, and credible marketing messages that resonate with a sophisticated audience.
- They are fluent in the language of nootropics, NAD+, metabolic health, and cellular optimization.
- They know how to build the trust that turns curious biohackers into lifelong brand advocates.

The best of the bunch? Let’s check them out.

## **Top Growth Marketing**

![](<Base64-Image-Removed>)

Let’s start with ourselves. Shameless, we know.

But we're an [ecommerce agency](https://topgrowthmarketing.com/ecommerce-marketing-agency/) that has been in the trenches with health and wellness brands for over 15 years. And since then, we are navigating the complexities of this industry to drive real, measurable growth.

**What we’re good at:** Marketing biohacking, supplement, and longevity brands that are tired of explaining the science to their marketing agency.

Whether you’re launching a new line of nootropics or scaling a meal delivery service, we understand the unique challenges and opportunities of this space.

**What we offer:** A team of performance-driven experts who are also passionate about health and wellness.

We’ve mastered the art of compliant advertising on platforms like Google and Meta, and we build sophisticated email and SMS funnels that educate, build trust, and convert.

**The proof:** We build sustainable growth engines for our clients. Some of the clients that can vouch for us are Millennium Health, Taste Salud, and many others.

[Reach out today](https://topgrowthmarketing.com/contact/)

## **Antlerzz**

![](<Base64-Image-Removed>)

Billed as the world’s first marketing strategy agency dedicated to the longevity industry, Antlerzz has a singular focus on this burgeoning market.

**Perfect for:** Longevity brands that want a partner completely immersed in the science and culture of healthy aging. If you’re in the business of extending healthspan, Antlerzz speaks your language.

**What they dominate:** Market intelligence and growth strategy. They don’t just execute campaigns; they provide the strategic insights and data to empower your own marketing team.

Their deep understanding of search trends (like the 480% increase in interest for NMN) allows them to position brands at the forefront of the conversation.

**The specialist advantage:** While other agencies are playing catch-up, Antlerzz is already deeply embedded in the longevity space. They understand the unique challenges of marketing products and services that people may not even know exist yet.

[Visit website](https://antlerzz.com/)

## **Front Row**

![](<Base64-Image-Removed>)

Front Row masters omnichannel marketing for science-backed wellness brands.

Your supplements have clinical studies, third-party testing, and real efficacy data—they know how to transform that evidence into trust and sales.

**Perfect for:** High-growth biohacking and supplement brands that need credibility across every channel, from TikTok education to Reddit AMAs to Whole Foods shelves. If your product sits at the intersection of science and performance, Front Row connects those dots brilliantly.

**What they deliver:** Marketing that meets consumers in their research phase—because biohackers spend weeks comparing ingredient dosages and bioavailability before buying. They activate health experts and trusted voices who can validate your claims without sounding like paid shills.

**The performance edge:** Their wellness clients outperform competitor agencies by 71% by optimizing both customer acquisition costs and lifetime value. For supplement brands, that means cheaper acquisition of educated customers who stick around for monthly subscriptions.

**Client Wins:** Their portfolio spans supplements, fitness, sleep optimization, and biohacking across major retailers and DTC platforms.

[Visit website](https://www.frontrowgroup.com/)

## **Evolut**

![](<Base64-Image-Removed>)

This Budapest-based agency serves supplement and longevity brands globally with their trademarked OMNIPRESENCE™ method. Biohacking requires exactly this—being everywhere your target audience researches, from longevity podcasts to biohacking forums to Instagram educational content.

**Perfect for:** Supplement and longevity brands wanting systematic, data-driven content production with global reach. If you need 300+ ad variations per month testing different health claims, ingredient highlights, and benefit messaging, Evolut's content machine delivers.

**What they offer:** Disciplined paid media strategies, Klaviyo email expertise, and social media management that produces massive volumes of compliant, tested creative. They specialize in building predictable content engines across all key channels.

**The founder's focus:** Founder Zsolt Farkas regularly speaks at the INNOCOS Longevity Summit, bringing cutting-edge industry knowledge and genuine passion for aging science to every campaign they run.

**Client Wins:** Hillvital, Solanie Cosmetics

[Visit website](https://evolut.nl/)

## **K2L**

![](<Base64-Image-Removed>)

K2L positions itself as "The Nootropics Marketing Agency"—that level of category specialization means they understand cognitive enhancement marketing better than any generalist ever could.

**Perfect for:** Nootropic and cognitive performance brands cutting through noise in an exploding category. If you're selling focus, mental clarity, and cognitive longevity, K2L has the strategic and creative expertise to make your stack stand out.

**What they dominate:** Clever creative paired with strategic positioning that makes complex supplement formulations feel accessible. Their full suite includes branding, web design, and digital marketing all calibrated for the unique challenges of cognitive enhancement products.

**The industry insight:** K2L navigates the treacherous waters of nootropic advertising regulations, offering guidance on compliant Google Ads strategies while still achieving strong performance. That expertise is invaluable when one wrong claim tanks your ad account.

**Client Wins:** Crush Supplements, GoNutrition

[Visit website](https://www.k2l.co.uk/)

## Pure Branding

![](<Base64-Image-Removed>)

Since 1999, Pure Branding has transformed science-heavy supplement companies into beloved consumer brands. They've seen every trend, navigated every regulatory shift, and perfected the art of making research resonate emotionally.

**Perfect for:** Research-backed supplement and longevity brands drowning in clinical data but struggling to connect with consumers. If your white papers are impressive but your conversion rate is dismal, Pure Branding translates science into stories that sell.

**What they master:** Deep consumer research that uncovers the emotional drivers behind supplement purchases. They don't lead with your bioavailability studies—they lead with "feel 10 years younger" and let the science support that promise.

**The legacy of success:** They tripled Gaia Herbs' sales by building a brand around radical transparency. Imagine that approach applied to your longevity supplements—turning ingredient sourcing and testing protocols into powerful differentiators.

**Client Wins:** Gaia Herbs, Persona, Biocidin Botanicals, Nestlé Health Science

[Visit website](https://purebranding.com/)

## **VELOX Media**

![](<Base64-Image-Removed>)

VELOX dominates health and wellness marketing through authoritative SEO and expert content. Supplement brands need identical strategies—biohackers spend months researching before committing to a new stack, and you need to own every touchpoint in that journey.

**Perfect for:** Biohacking and supplement brands that need to dominate high-intent searches and comparison content. If potential customers are Googling "best NMN supplement 2025" or "resveratrol vs pterostilbene," VELOX gets you to the top with content that actually converts.

**What they offer:** Strategic SEO combined with expert-level content that establishes category authority. They understand that supplement purchases involve extensive research cycles, and they build trust by answering every scientific question consumers have.

**The partner advantage:** As a Google Premier Partner for 8+ years, they know exactly how to win on the platform where most supplement research begins. That expertise, focused on wellness verticals, makes them formidable allies.

**Client Wins:** Dr. Axe, Goop, Reebok, Saalt

[Visit website](https://www.veloxmedia.com/)

## **Nuvolum**

![](<Base64-Image-Removed>)

Nuvolum specializes in marketing advanced functional medicine and longevity therapies by making cutting-edge science feel approachable. That's precisely what biohacking brands need—taking NAD+ IV therapy, peptide protocols, and longevity diagnostics and making them accessible to mainstream health optimizers.

**Perfect for:** Functional medicine clinics, biohacking centers, and longevity practices offering advanced interventions. If you're introducing peptides, stem cell therapy, or metabolic testing to consumers, Nuvolum makes the complex feel trustworthy.

**What they deliver:** Benefits-first messaging and intuitive web design that educates before selling. They build service explainer videos and patient testimonials that demystify advanced treatments and create the social proof needed for high-ticket conversions.

**The educational approach:** In longevity marketing, education is conversion. Nuvolum builds authoritative content that empowers consumers to understand advanced therapies, turning curiosity into confidence and confidence into appointments.

**Client Wins:** Remedy Functional Health

[Visit website](https://nuvolum.com/)

## **MuteSix**

![](<Base64-Image-Removed>)

MuteSix accelerates DTC disruptors with over $1.2 billion in direct revenue generated for clients. That kind of performance firepower is exactly what aggressive supplement brands need to scale past the biohacker early adopters into mass wellness markets.

**Perfect for:** Direct-to-consumer biohacking and supplement brands ready to scale aggressively. If you've proven product-market fit with your initial formulations and need to 10x your customer base, MuteSix has the omnichannel expertise to make it happen.

**What they offer:** End-to-end performance marketing across Meta, Google, TikTok, and Amazon. They combine creative testing at massive scale with sophisticated media buying to maximize every dollar of your growth budget while staying compliant.

**The performance powerhouse:** $1.2 billion in client revenue demonstrates their ability to scale DTC brands efficiently. They respond in real-time to platform changes, constantly optimizing campaigns for supplement category nuances and seasonal buying patterns.

**Client Wins:** Some of the fastest-growing DTC brands in health and wellness.

[Visit website](https://mutesix.com/)

## **InBeat**

![](<Base64-Image-Removed>)

inBeat has mastered influencer and UGC marketing for wellness brands. Supplement companies need the exact same approach—authentic voices sharing real results, personal stacks, and genuine transformations that paid ads simply can't replicate.

**Perfect for:** Biohacking and supplement brands leveraging creator content and social proof to overcome skepticism. In a category where 82% of consumers prioritize wellness but distrust marketing claims, inBeat connects you with voices people actually believe.

**What they dominate:** Matching brands with the top 2% of health and wellness creators who genuinely use longevity supplements themselves. They generate authentic content at scale—the morning routine videos, the "my supplement stack" reels, and the honest reviews that convert skeptics into customers.

**The creator connection:** Their network of micro- and nano-influencers provides credible supplement content that resonates with health-conscious consumers researching their next biohacking protocol.

**Client Wins:** New Balance, Hurom, Got Milk?, Soylent

[Visit website](https://www.inbeat.co/)

## **Finding Your Longevity Partner**

The biohacking and longevity market rewards brands that simplify complex science, build trust quickly, and turn one-time buyers into lifelong health optimizers. E

very agency on this list brings proven expertise in wellness marketing, regulatory navigation, and transforming research into revenue.

Choose the partner that matches your current stage and your growth ambitions.

Frequently Asked Questions

### What should I look for in a biohacking or longevity marketing agency?

Look for agencies with proven experience in regulated health and supplement marketing — specifically knowledge of FTC health claim guidelines, FDA structure/function claim rules, and the ability to write compelling scientific content without crossing into medical device or drug claim territory. Ask for case studies from supplement, nootropic, or functional health brands specifically.

### How is marketing biohacking brands different from general eCommerce?

Biohacking audiences are highly research-oriented — they read ingredient labels, check clinical studies, and are skeptical of hyperbolic marketing claims. Content-driven marketing (long-form educational blogs, ingredient breakdowns, interview content with researchers) converts better than typical DTC tactics. Social proof from credible sources (medical professionals, athletes, researchers) outperforms celebrity endorsements.

### What marketing channels work best for biohacking and longevity brands?

The highest-performing channels for biohacking brands are: SEO/content (long-form educational content captures high-intent research traffic), email (high LTV audience receptive to education-based sequences), YouTube and podcasts (video content on mechanism of action builds deep trust), and influencer partnerships with credentialed experts (doctors, researchers, elite athletes) rather than lifestyle influencers.

### What are the FTC rules for biohacking supplement marketing?

Supplements can make structure/function claims (what a nutrient does for the body) but not disease claims (treating, curing, or preventing disease). Claims must be truthful, substantiated by competent and reliable scientific evidence, and include the FTC disclaimer '\* These statements have not been evaluated by the FDA.' A qualified agency will audit all ad copy and website claims before launch to prevent FTC compliance issues.

### How much does it cost to hire a longevity/biohacking marketing agency?

Specialized health and supplement agencies typically charge $3,000–$8,000/month for full-service management, with retainers at the higher end for brands requiring significant regulatory review of content. Budget an additional $5,000–$20,000/month for paid media depending on scale. Niche expertise commands a premium, but brands that try to use generalist agencies for regulated health categories frequently face compliance issues that cost more to fix.

### What compliance issues should biohacking brands watch out for in marketing?

Top compliance risks: making disease claims in ad copy or landing pages (triggers FDA and FTC scrutiny), using before/after testimonials without proper disclosure, making claims about specific dosages or therapeutic effects, and failing to include required disclaimers. Run all ad copy through legal review before launch, maintain a substantiation file for every claim you make, and audit landing pages against FTC guidelines quarterly.
